ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of data collection */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of data collection */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata regarding data parameters */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the data collection site */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived, pending review) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dataset */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dataset was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement parameter (e.g., URM, LRM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "range_min" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "range_max" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  "precision" INTEGER /* Number of decimal places for the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this data point belongs to */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement parameter related to this data point */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "geographic_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude, longitude) of the data point */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data point was collected */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag to indicate the quality of the data point */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to collect the data point */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data point was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES measurement_parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the research site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the research site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact information for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the research site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the research site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the research site */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the research site */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the research site was established */,
  "last_survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the last survey conducted at the site */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the site was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the site was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role assigned to the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client (e.g., browser, device) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event (e.g., in seconds) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the audit */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user when performing the action */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client (e.g., browser, device) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., satellite, on-ground sensor) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data source */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the data source */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the data source */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data source was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with the quality metric */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Description of the quality metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the quality metric */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to assess the quality metric */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the quality metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the quality metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the quality metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the report is based on */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_link" TEXT /* Link to the generated report file */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to generate the report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset associated with this version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Description of the methodology used to create the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
